channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Eight members of a family die in Indore house fire caused by electric vehicle explosion
item.description: Early on Wednesday, 18th March 2026, a tragic incident occurred in Indore where eight members of a family, including two children, lost their lives in a fire that broke out due to an explosion at an e...

item.description: Dar es Salaam – President Samia Suluhu Hassan has explained that the creation of the Presidential Commission on Tax Reforms came as a response to long-standing concerns from citizens, business owners,...

item.title: Oil price surge raises short-term inflation concerns, long-term outlook remains stable
item.description: Recent spikes in oil and energy prices, driven largely by geopolitical tensions in Iran, have caused a noticeable short-term increase in inflation expectations among investors and financial markets. C...

item.title: How to Manage Your Social Media Scrolling Habits
item.description: The article explains the concept of infinite scroll, a feature on social media, shopping, and video apps that continuously loads content as you browse, making it hard to stop. This design exploits hum...

item.title: Jessica Alba and Cash Warren finalize divorce and agree to equal asset division
item.description: Jessica Alba and Cash Warren have officially finalized their divorce after more than a year of separation, marking the end of their 16-year marriage. According to court filings signed on March 16 and ...

item.title: How to read the Dune book series in publication and chronological order ahead of Dune: Part Three

item.title: Court Declares Nigerians Get Right to Record Police Officers on Duty and Bans Anonymous Policing
item.description: The Federal High Court for Warri, Delta State don give one major judgment wey confirm say Nigerians get full constitutional right to record, snap, or document police officers when dem dey work for pub...

item.title: Northern Ontario municipalities request federal support to improve Highway 11 and 17 safety and infrastructure
item.description: Northern Ontario is facing a deadly winter on its main highways, prompting local politicians to urgently seek federal support. The Northwestern Ontario Municipalities Association (NOMA) has written to...

item.title: Railway officials can travel with families on luxury trains as per norms: Minister Vaishnaw
item.description: In a written statement in the Lok Sabha on Wednesday, Railway Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw clarified that railway officials are allowed to travel with their families on Indian Railways trains only in acc...

item.title: Nigel Farage’s Paid Cameo Messages Include Controversial Requests

item.title: How ethical influence can shape political power
item.description: The article discusses the concept of ethical influence in political systems, emphasising that meaningful change rarely happens overnight. Instead, power shifts gradually, often when persistent pressur...

item.title: TECNO Launches CAMON 50 Series with Advanced Cameras and AI Tools
item.description: TECNO don drop dia new CAMON 50 series wey get three models: CAMON 50, CAMON 50 Pro, and CAMON 50 Ultra 5G. These phones dey designed to help people wey dey take plenty pictures, create content, and m...

item.title: Episode One: Investigation into the 2011 Murder of Off-Duty Chicago Police Officer Clifton Lewis and Subsequent Arrests
item.description: On the evening of 29 December 2011, Chicago police officer Clifton Lewis was working as a moonlighting security guard at a local minimart when two armed men entered and shot him several times. The att...

item.title: Parliament Reviews Agriculture and Welfare Grants, PM Modi Bids Farewell to Retiring MPs

item.title: RBA faces complex economic challenges amid global instability and Trump’s unpredictable policies
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia’s recent interest rate hike, while challenging, represents only the beginning of a far more complex economic environment. Previously, the RBA's decisions centred largely ...

item.title: Niger Rejects European Pressure Over Former President Bazoum
item.description: Niger don’t gree say European Union go dey tell dem how to run their own matter. Shortly after European Parliament yan say make dem release former president Mohamed Bazoum wey France support, Niger ha...
